title: Luffy Carries Oden’s Will Forward
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Luffy, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Kid, Law, Unknown person #11 as The Worst Generation confronts Kaido and Big Mom on Onigashima.
scene: On the rooftop of Onigashima, the Worst Generation challenges Kaido and Big Mom directly, turning the raid into a clash against emperors.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I'd been using my "Punishers" back then,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You'd have been dead meat, zerojuro!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It'd have ended the same regardless!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I need to release more of "EMMA'S" power...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'll settle this fight in an instant!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: These brats are like little monsters!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know full well how tough your skin is!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I wonder if you can endure being crushed to death!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My surgery will grant you a swift death...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Voro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro roro ro

summary: This part advances the Wano / Rooftop Battle storyline through 34 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
